payload.answer: The requested article could not be remembered as content because the fetch failed with a 404 network error; only the failure is retained.
payload.decision: Do not commit the article content as durable memory because no content was retrieved. Record only the fetch failure and the unresolved article reference.

entity_resolution.reason: The article could not be retrieved, so there is no reliable content to resolve into a persistent entity.

payload.intent: Attempt to remember an article at https://example.com/missing for memory architecture, but the fetch returned a 404 network error.

memory_cards.statement: An attempt to fetch the article at https://example.com/missing failed with a 404 network error.

details: No article content available to store as durable memory.
